page: Microsoft Azure A8m_v2 is an Av2-family memory-intensive virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8171M processor operating at a base frequency of 2.6 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Additionally, the instance is provisioned with 82 GB of local storage, has no integrated GPU accelerators, and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark results indicate that the A8m_v2 exhibits lower-tier processing and memory performance. In CPU-bound evaluations, the instance recorded a single-core stress-ng score of 356.79 and a multi-core score of 2763.6. Memory bandwidth tests showed 32.02 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 24.79 GB/sec for large-block write operations, both placing in the bottom 25% of tested instances. Geekbench metrics further confirm these performance characteristics, with a single-core score of 369.0 and a multi-core score of 2083.0.

The primary tradeoff of the A8m_v2 is its high memory capacity relative to its processing speed. While the 64.0 GB RAM allocation supports memory-heavy workloads, the underlying Intel Xeon 8171M processor delivers weak computational throughput, as evidenced by a Passmark database operations score of 1782.5 and a Redis SET throughput of 3.94 million operations per second. This profile makes the instance suitable for legacy memory-intensive applications, basic database hosting, caching layers, and general-purpose workloads that require substantial memory capacity but have low CPU performance demands.
description: Microsoft Azure A8m_v2 is an Av2-family memory-intensive virtual machine configured with 8 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8171M processor running at 2.6 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V, it features 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, alongside 82 GB of local storage. Performance benchmarks place the instance in the lower tiers, with a single-core Geekbench score of 369.0 and a multi-core stress-ng score of 2763.6. Memory bandwidth is similarly constrained, measuring 32.02 GB/sec for large-block reads. Given the high memory capacity paired with modest CPU performance, the A8m_v2 is best suited for memory-heavy workloads with low computational demands, such as caching systems, basic database hosting, and legacy enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure A8m_v2 is an Av2-family memory-intensive virtual machine featuring 8 Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB of RAM, and 82 GB of local storage for memory-heavy, low-CPU workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 virtual machine offering a high memory-to-core ratio and local storage for memory-intensive workloads with moderate CPU requirements.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
High memory capacity paired with entry-level CPU performance
Suited for caching, basic database hosting, and legacy applications
